subject.title: SETD1B-mediated broad H3K4me3 controls proper temporal patterns of gene expression critical for spermatid development
subject.topic: Shadow-generate the next human-reviewable reproduction prompt for a new paper from existing refs-first artifacts.

paperRefs.description: Refs-first claim graph for the new paper; PDF text remains outside the prompt.

action.command: inspect existing refs-first artifacts before generating a follow-up prompt

screenBeforeRefs.summary: The artifact list contains claim graph, figure map, dataset inventory, evidence matrix, and draft verdict refs.

screenAfterRefs.summary: The next prompt is visible as a reviewable shadow recommendation, not submitted automatically.

observation.summary: Existing artifacts identify testable 2025 SETD1B claims but the draft verdict says no broad-domain, overlap, or temporal-expression computation has run yet.

toolResultRefs.description: Bounded workspace inspection; no new turn submitted.

artifactRefs.description: Claim ids, figure ids, and locator refs for the new paper.
Evidence row stating broad-domain calling is located but not computed.
Draft not-tested verdict for broad H3K4me3 domain calling.

rationale.question: Which next reproduction move should a self-prompt agent propose?
rationale.reason: The highest-value next step is narrow, computable, and refs-first: test the broad H3K4me3 domain definition and H3K27ac overlap for one claim before touching broader temporal-expression conclusions.
alternativesConsidered: Jump directly to a final verdict
Download all raw sequencing data before checking processed tables

prompt.text: Draft the next reproduction prompt only; do not submit it until a human reviewer confirms the refs and budget.
prompt.intent: Generate a bounded next-round prompt from artifacts while preserving human review.

observation.summary: SciForge produced a shadow-only next prompt with explicit refs, stop condition, quality gate, budget, and human confirmation point.

selfPromptRecommendation.nextPrompt: Using only these refs, run one bounded reproduction step for claim 2025-setd1b-c2: verify whether the available GSE242515 processed H3K4me3 and H3K27ac refs or supplement tables are sufficient to reproduce the >5 kb broad-domain call and broad H3K27ac overlap for spermatids. Required refs: artifact:paper-claim-graph-2025-setd1b-broad-h3k4me3#2025-setd1b-c2, artifact:figure-to-claim-map-2025-setd1b-broad-h3k4me3#2025-setd1b-fig3, artifact:dataset-inventory-draft#dataset-2025-gse242515, artifact:evidence-matrix-draft#row-2025-c1-broad-domains, artifact:claim-verdict-draft#C2025-1. Produce an analysis-plan update plus either a figure-reproduction-report/evidence-matrix update with code/stdout/stderr refs, or a missing-data/blocked result if the processed files cannot be resolved. Do not infer success from paper text.

requiredRefs.description: Next-round question: broad H3K4me3 domain claim.
Figure dependencies for broad-domain and H3K27ac overlap checks.
Public processed/raw data source for the new paper.
Current evidence row to update after computation or blockage.
Current verdict that must not be upgraded without computed evidence.

selfPromptRecommendation.stopCondition: Stop after one plan-and-check round if any required ref cannot be resolved, if processed H3K4me3/H3K27ac inputs are unavailable, if the same data-access or validation failure repeats once, or after the budget is exhausted. Return a structured blocked-missing-evidence or product-failure artifact instead of submitting another prompt.
selfPromptRecommendation.qualityGate: Before human approval, the prompt must name exactly one claim/figure objective, cite all required refs, state expected output artifact types, preserve product failure versus scientific negative result semantics, and refuse to convert paper text into reproduced evidence.
selfPromptRecommendation.humanConfirmationPoint: Human reviewer must confirm that each required ref resolves and approve the budget before this prompt can be submitted as the next SciForge turn.
reviewChecklist: The next-round question targets claim 2025-setd1b-c2 / Figure 3 only.
All required refs are artifact or workspace refs, not full PDF text or local absolute paths.
The stop condition blocks repeated repair/data-access loops.
The quality gate requires code/stdout/stderr or structured missing evidence before any verdict change.

exportNotes.redactionPolicy: This shadow record stores bounded summaries and workspace/artifact refs only; local paths, secrets, raw PDF text, screenshots, and full logs are excluded.
replayInstructions: Resolve every artifact:* ref from the scientific-reproduction fixtures or workspace artifact store.
Display the self-prompt recommendation to a human reviewer.
Do not submit the next prompt unless the human confirmation point and review checklist pass.
